code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
mut has_val = false
mut max_val = 0
mut min_val = 0

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      -1
    end
  else
    -1
  end

  let is_ws = i == n or b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        if not has_val
          max_val = v
          min_val = v
          has_val = true
        else
          if v > max_val
            max_val = v
          end
          if v < min_val
            min_val = v
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("max=#{max_val}")
println("min=#{min_val}")
